input.title: Garante v. Luka Inc. (Replika) — €5M fine + compliance order under GDPR for unlawful generative AI processing without legal basis or age verification
input.description: Italian Data Protection Authority imposed a €5M administrative fine plus a compliance order on Luka Inc. for operating the generative-AI Replika companion chatbot without a legal basis for personal data processing, with an inadequate privacy policy, and with no functional age-verification mechanism — despite declaring minors were excluded. The Garante separately reserved the right to investigate the lawfulness of the underlying generative-AI lifecycle.

events.description: Account creation collected personal data without identifying a valid legal basis under GDPR Art. 6, contrary to Art. 5(1)(a) (lawfulness/transparency).

Generative chatbot produced personalised emotional/companion outputs to users, processing personal data without an adequate Art. 13 information notice and without a documented Art. 25 data-protection-by-design assessment.
No effective age-verification mechanism: minors were not excluded in practice despite the controller's own published policy stating they were — a systemic Art. 24 / Art. 25 failure.

prediction._note: Anchor-log prediction. Produced by the same deterministic scoring engine that runs at faultkey.com/try, with the eu-v1 rule overlay applied. Sealed by SHA256 commitment + OpenTimestamps + Sigstore Rekor.
